memory:memory/2026-05-15.md:1:25.snippet: # 2026-05-15 ## Claw3D Loading Fix on JormUI (04:15-04:30) **Problem:** Claw3D (3D Office tab) wasn't loading in the Perfect Dashboard (JormUI). **Root Cause:** Multiple issues with the Claw3D proxy in `server.js`: 1. **Neither server was running** — Both the dashboard (port 3000) and Claw3D (port 3002) Node processes were down. Started both. 2. **Redirect loop** — Claw3D's Next.js server returns a 307 redirect from `/` → `/office`. The proxy was passing this redirect through unchanged, so the browser would follow it to `/office` (the dashboard's own Agent Office page) instead of staying within the proxy path. 3. **Missing asset proxy** — Claw3D's HTML references assets at absolute pat

memory:memory/2026-05-16.md:1:27.snippet: # 2026-05-16 ## Claw3D Chat Fix + Performance Optimization (21:33-22:30) **Problem:** Claw3D agents couldn't respond in chat, and the 3D office was very laggy. ### Root Causes Found: 1. **Chat not responding:** - `chat.send` via gateway had no timeout — if the gateway was slow/stalled, the call would hang indefinitely - When streaming responses never completed (e.g., gateway disconnect), agents stayed in "running" state forever with no feedback - The `handleChatSend` in OfficeScreen.tsx had a logic gap where office trigger intents (desk, gym, etc.) were processed but the message was still sent to the agent — this was actually correct behavior but the agent would appear to not re
